entity.label: Rissah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Heap of ruins; dew, a station of the Israelites in the wilderness (Num. 33:21, 22).

nodes.label: Rissah
nodes.description: Heap of ruins; dew, a station of the Israelites in the wilderness (Num. 33:21, 22).

verses.text: And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.
And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.
